items.title: Series/DataFrame 基本创建
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
s = pd.Series([1,3,5,np.nan,6,8])
df = pd.DataFrame({'A':[1,2,3], 'B':['x','y','z']})
print('Series:\n', s)
print('\nDataFrame:\n', df)

items.title: 时间索引与随机 DF
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
idx = pd.date_range('2024-01-01', periods=6, freq='D')
df = pd.DataFrame(np.random.randn(6,4), index=idx, columns=list('ABCD'))
print(df)

items.title: head/info/describe
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'age':[23,25,np.nan,30,28],'city':['BJ','SH','GZ','BJ',None],'score':[85,92,76,88,90]})
print('head:\n', df.head())
print('\ninfo:')
df.info()
print('\ndescribe(all):\n', df.describe(include='all'))

items.title: 结构信息
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'x':[1,2,3],'y':[4,5,6]})
print('dtypes:', df.dtypes)
print('shape:', df.shape)
print('columns:', df.columns)
print('index:', df.index)

items.title: loc/iloc 选择
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame(np.arange(16).reshape(4,4), columns=list('ABCD'))
print('loc 行标签切片:\n', df.loc[1:3, ['A','C']])
print('\niloc 位置切片:\n', df.iloc[1:3, 0:2])

items.title: at/iat 快速标量访问
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame(np.arange(9).reshape(3,3), columns=list('ABC'))
print('at(1,\'B\')=', df.at[1, 'B'], ' iat(2,0)=', df.iat[2,0])

items.title: 布尔与 query
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'age':[20,25,30,35],'score':[88,92,76,90]})
print(df[df['age']>=30])
print(df.query('score>88'))

items.title: isna/fillna
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'a':[1,np.nan,3],'b':[np.nan,5,6]})
print('isna:\n', df.isna())
print('\nfillna 均值:\n', df.fillna(df.mean(numeric_only=True)))

items.title: dropna
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'a':[1,np.nan,3],'b':[4,5,np.nan]})
print('dropna 行:\n', df.dropna())
print('\ndropna 列(阈值):\n', df.dropna(axis=1, thresh=2))

items.title: assign/apply/map
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'x':[1,2,3],'y':[4,5,6]})
df2 = df.assign(z=lambda d: d['x']+d['y'])
print('assign z=x+y:\n', df2)
print('\napply 行和:\n', df.apply(sum, axis=1))
print('\nmap 示例:\n', pd.Series(['a','b','a']).map({'a':1,'b':2}))

items.title: replace/astype
items.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(['A','B','A'])
print('replace A->1:', s.replace({'A':1}))
print('astype category:', s.astype('category'))

items.title: groupby/agg/transform
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'city':['BJ','BJ','SH','SH','GZ'],'score':[85,90,92,88,76]})
print('均分:\n', df.groupby('city')['score'].mean())
print('\nagg 多指标:\n', df.groupby('city')['score'].agg(['mean','max','count']))
print('\ntransform 标准化:\n', df.assign(z=df.groupby('city')['score'].transform(lambda s:(s-s.mean())/s.std())))

items.title: concat 堆叠
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df1 = pd.DataFrame({'id':[1,2],'x':[10,20]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'id':[3,4],'x':[30,40]})
print(pd.concat([df1, df2], ignore_index=True))

items.title: merge 连接
items.code:
import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({'id':[1,2,3],'x':[10,20,30]})
b = pd.DataFrame({'id':[2,3,4],'y':[200,300,400]})
print(pd.merge(a, b, on='id', how='outer'))

items.title: 排序
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'id':[3,1,2],'score':[88,76,92]})
print('按 score 排序:\n', df.sort_values('score'))
print('\n按 index 排序:\n', df.sort_index())

items.title: 透视/展开
items.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({'city':['BJ','BJ','SH','SH'],'subject':['math','eng','math','eng'],'score':[90,85,88,92]})
pt = pd.pivot_table(df, index='city', columns='subject', values='score')
print('pivot_table:\n', pt)
print('\nmelt:\n', pt.reset_index().melt('city', var_name='subject', value_name='score'))

items.title: to_datetime/resample
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
idx = pd.date_range('2024-01-01', periods=48, freq='H')
df = pd.DataFrame({'v': np.random.randn(48)}, index=idx)
print(df.resample('D').mean())

items.title: to_csv 导出字符串
items.code:
import pandas as pd
import io
df = pd.DataFrame({'a':[1,2],'b':[3,4]})
buf = io.StringIO()
df.to_csv(buf, index=False)
print(buf.getvalue())

items.title: 字符串方法
items.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([' Foo ', 'BAR', 'baZ '])
print(s.str.strip().str.lower().str.capitalize())
